name: What's max workers comp for total disability from occupational disease in Idaho?
description: 2/3 wage up to state max for life if totally disabled.[2]

mainEntity.name: What's max workers comp for total disability from occupational disease in Idaho?

acceptedAnswer.text: 2/3 wage up to state max for life if totally disabled.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: Two-thirds of average weekly wage, max statutory cap (around $1,000+/week, check current); lifetime for total.[2] Key factors: Prove permanence; offsets SSDI; settlements possible.[2] Calculate with pay stubs. Attorney negotiates fair value.
